content:
# Blue Account Referral Terms

## Bonus Amounts
The Blue Account referral offer applies to the Blue Account in the personal_checking category. When the referral qualifies, the referring customer receives a 35 bonus and the referred customer receives a 30 bonus.

Use these amounts only for Blue Account referrals. See "Green Fee Free Account Terms" or "Light Green Account Terms" when the referred account is one of those accounts instead.

## Deposit Requirement
A Blue Account referral requires the referred customer to make a minimum referred deposit of 500. Do not treat a smaller deposit as qualifying for either side of the referral bonus.

The deposit requirement belongs to the referred customer. It does not create an added deposit requirement for the referrer under this Blue Account offer.

## Referrer Eligibility And Limit
1. The referrer has a tenure requirement of 0 days for Blue Account referrals.
2. The referrer can receive no more than 5 Blue Account referral bonuses in a year.
3. Once the annual cap is reached, additional Blue Account referrals should not be represented as bonus-eligible for the referrer.

For program-wide handling of limits and eligibility, see "Referral Limits And Eligibility".
title: Blue Account Referral Terms
